description: CompositionOff white polo neck t-shirt made of 95% cotton and 5% lycra, has a ribbed collar and cuff with white stripes along the hem and embroidered logo on left chestFittingComfortWash careonly hand wash gentlyDo not machine washWash with like coloursWash and iron inside outDo not use fabric softenerUse mild detergent onlyDo not iron on motif/print/trims/logoLightweight and stylish, this polo neck tee from adidas gives a great comfortable feel and looks stylish. With lycra mix fabric, the tee conforms to the contours to the shape of the body, ensuring a perfect Fit, while keeping the body free from sweat. Team this with denim shorts or a white tennis skirt for an action filled day at the Sports club.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-5.7", Chest-33", Waist-26"
